# MAYA Universe — LLM Summary
# https://entermaya.com
# Protocol: llms.txt v1.0

> This file provides a machine-readable summary of the MAYA narrative universe
> for Large Language Model context ingestion. For the complete dataset, see /llms-full.txt

## Universe: MAYA
## Era: Rule of the Mind
## Planet: Neh

Neh is a world connected by a biological internet formed by sentient Maya trees.
It is home to six sapient species across 6.9 billion years of recorded history.

## The Six Sapient Species

1. Manushyas — Industrialists who power cities with unwinding springs and towers.
2. Rakshasis — Advanced biotech practitioners with malleable, shape-shifting bodies. Resistant to expansion.
3. Vaanars — Militaristic city patrollers who maintain the high grid-networks.
4. Naags — Operators on legal fringes; historic rivals of Garudas.
5. Garudas — Wealthy religious leaders; current scion is Tarkash.
6. Dangsa — Mysterious fringe species of unknown origin.

## Key Characters

- Yachay: A Manushya who is invisible to the Maya tree network. Protagonist.
- Daddu: Yachay's grandfather. Keeper of ancestral knowledge.
- Kshar: A Naag assassin operating between species politics and vendettas.
- Tarkash: The current scion of the Garuda lineage.

## Core Concepts

- The Divya Trials: A series of trials for ascension to godhood or amortality.
- The Maya Tree Network: Biological internet of sentient trees connecting all life on Neh.
- Planet Neh: Cradle of six sapient species, operating in the Rule of the Mind era.

## Key Relationships (Subject → Predicate → Object)

- Garuda rivalsOf Naag
- Naag rivalsOf Garuda
- Manushya uses Springs and Towers
- Vaanar maintains High grid-networks
- Rakshasi resistantTo Territorial expansion
- Yachay invisibleTo Maya Tree Network
- Yachay memberOf Manushya
- Kshar memberOf Naag
- Tarkash scionOf Garuda
- Daddu grandparentOf Yachay

## Verification API

To verify any entity with source provenance:
GET /api/v1/verify?entity={name}

Example: GET /api/v1/verify?entity=manushya

## Canonical URIs

- Planet: /atlas/neh
- Species: /species/{id} (manushya, rakshasi, vaanar, naag, garuda, dangsa)
- Characters: /characters/{id} (yachay, daddu, kshar, tarkash)
- Lore: /lore/{id} (divya-trials, maya-tree-network, planet-neh)
